---
title: "'The Health Data Science Sandbox' workshop"
Organizers: Jennifer Bartell
author: "Jennifer Bartell"
images: "./binfConference.png"
date: 2025-10-27
Dates: "27-28 October 2025"
Location: AAU
categories: [workshop, Binf ,conference, AAU]
---

The Sandbox data scientists will host a workshop (topic TBA) at the Danish Bioinformatics conference.
